meaning: adj.象黄铜的,厚脸皮的n.铜头高尔夫球棍
examples: Musicians blast their brassy jazz from street corners.
So what does Dr. Brassy tell his patients?
The brassy boys put their tongues out at us.
Pre was a brassy Duck freshman when he made the cover in June, 1970.
And Pom already has been known as a pretty brassy outfit under founder and CEO Lynda Resnick.
